prompt: I'm transitioning into product management from engineering and need to understand the domain deeply before my first PM role starts next month

assertions.name: has-anchor-points
assertions.description: Output contains 'Anchor Points' mapping engineering background to PM concepts

assertions.name: engineering-bridge
assertions.description: Anchor points explicitly reference engineering concepts as bridges (e.g., 'sprints → roadmapping', 'code review → stakeholder review')

assertions.name: has-domain-landscape
assertions.description: Output contains 'Domain Landscape' with 5-7 PM areas

assertions.name: urgency-reflected
assertions.description: Priority map reflects the 'next month' urgency — prioritizes what to learn first for Day 1

assertions.name: has-priority-map
assertions.description: Output contains 'Learning Priority Map' personalized to career transition

assertions.name: file-saved
assertions.description: A domain-orient-*.md file is saved to the outputs directory
